title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
